sitename.source_text: Field trials were conducted at the Ames Research Farm, Iowa State University, Ames, Iowa.

elevation.source_text: Elevation of the site is approximately 291 m above sea level.

notes.source_text: Soil type is Mollisol with a prior corn-soybean rotation.

sand.source_text: Soil texture analysis showed 35% sand, 42% silt, and 23% clay.

silt.source_text: Soil texture analysis showed 35% sand, 42% silt, and 23% clay.

clay.source_text: Soil texture analysis showed 35% sand, 42% silt, and 23% clay.

name.source_text: Maize (Zea mays L.) hybrids were planted in May 2021.
Soybean (Glycine max [L.] Merr.) was used as the reference crop.
The maize hybrid DKC52-61 was planted at a density of 79,000 seeds ha⁻¹.

notes.source_text: DKC52-61 is a commercial hybrid marketed by Dekalb.

name.source_text: Soybean variety P22T61R was grown in adjacent plots.

notes.source_text: P22T61R is a maturity group 2.2 soybean.

datetime.source_text: Canopy height was measured on August 15, 2021.

crop.source_text: Maize canopy height averaged 2.85 m at silking.

cultivar.source_text: DKC52-61 canopy height measured at R1 stage.

sitename.source_text: Measurements taken at Ames Research Farm.

trait.source_text: Canopy height was measured as the distance from the soil surface to the uppermost leaf tip.

method.source_text: Canopy height was measured with a standard metric tape measure.

mean.source_text: Maize canopy height averaged 2.85 m at silking.

n.source_text: Measurements were taken from 12 representative plants per plot.

stat.source_text: SE of canopy height was 0.07 m.

datetime.source_text: Leaf nitrogen content was determined from samples collected on August 20, 2021.

crop.source_text: Maize leaf nitrogen content was analyzed.

cultivar.source_text: Ear leaf samples from DKC52-61 were analyzed for N.

sitename.source_text: Samples collected from Ames Research Farm.

trait.source_text: Leaf nitrogen concentration was determined by combustion analysis.

method.source_text: Total nitrogen was measured using Dumas combustion method.

mean.source_text: Mean leaf N concentration was 3.12% in the high-N treatment.

units.source_text: Nitrogen concentrations expressed as percentage of dry matter.

n.source_text: Eight plants per plot were sampled for leaf N analysis.

stat.source_text: Standard deviation for leaf N was 0.18%.

datetime.source_text: Grain yield was determined at harvest on September 28, 2021.

cultivar.source_text: Grain yield of DKC52-61 was recorded.

trait.source_text: Grain yield was determined from a 2-row harvest section.

method.source_text: Grain was harvested with a Massey Ferguson 8XP plot combine.

mean.source_text: Mean grain yield across nitrogen treatments was 11.4 Mg ha⁻¹.

units.source_text: Yield expressed in Mg ha⁻¹ at 15.5% moisture.

n.source_text: Four replicate plots per treatment were harvested.

stat.source_text: SE of grain yield was 0.23 Mg ha⁻¹.

name.source_text: Canopy height was measured as the distance from the soil surface to the uppermost leaf tip.

description.value: Distance from soil surface to the uppermost leaf tip of the plant.
description.source_text: Canopy height was measured as the distance from the soil surface to the uppermost leaf tip.

name.source_text: Leaf nitrogen concentration was determined by combustion analysis.

units.source_text: Nitrogen concentrations expressed as percentage of dry matter.

description.value: Nitrogen concentration in the ear leaf at silking stage, expressed as percentage of dry mass.
description.source_text: Ear-leaf N content was used as indicator of plant N status at silking.

name.source_text: Grain yield was determined from a 2-row harvest section.

units.source_text: Yield expressed in Mg ha⁻¹ at 15.5% moisture.

description.value: Maize grain yield adjusted to 15.5% moisture content.

description.source_text: Canopy height was measured with a standard metric tape measure from soil surface to leaf tip.

name.source_text: Total nitrogen was measured using Dumas combustion method.

description.value: Dry combustion analysis for total nitrogen determination (LECO CN628).
description.source_text: Nitrogen was analyzed on a LECO CN628 combustion analyzer.

name.source_text: Grain was harvested with a Massey Ferguson 8XP plot combine.

description.value: Massey Ferguson 8XP plot combine used for grain harvest; yield adjusted to 15.5% moisture.
description.source_text: Grain harvested with Massey Ferguson 8XP and adjusted to 15.5% moisture.

name.source_text: High-N treatment received 202 kg N ha⁻¹ as urea.

description.value: 202 kg N ha⁻¹ applied as urea (46-0-0) pre-plant.
description.source_text: High-N plots received 202 kg N ha⁻¹ as urea (46-0-0) applied pre-plant.

name.source_text: Low-N treatment received 67 kg N ha⁻¹.

description.value: 67 kg N ha⁻¹ applied as urea (46-0-0) pre-plant.
description.source_text: Low-N plots received 67 kg N ha⁻¹ applied pre-plant.

name.source_text: Control plots received no N fertilizer.

description.source_text: Control plots received no N fertilizer.

description.value: Maize hybrid DKC52-61 planted at 79,000 seeds ha⁻¹.
description.source_text: DKC52-61 was planted at 79,000 seeds ha⁻¹ using a John Deere 7000 planter.

description.value: Pre-plant urea broadcast application at treatment rates.
description.source_text: Urea was broadcast-applied at treatment rates prior to planting.
